name: @onderling-app/calendar
description: Calendar / appointment app — composes @onderling/item-store + @onderling/item-types/CALENDAR_EVENT_SCHEMA + @onderling/pseudo-pod.  v0.7.10 ships in-memory (MemoryBackend); v0.7.11 swaps to Solid-pod-backed storage (iCal via @onderling/calendar-emission substrate, to be extracted from apps/tasks-v0).
